destinations.evidence: Inspector-created EVMs set inspect=true, and transact_raw uses inspect_replay instead of normal transact when that flag is enabled.

equivalence_argument: The inspector factory path sets the inspection flag on the RitualEvm value, and transact_raw branches on that flag to use revm_inspector::InspectEvm::inspect_replay after installing the transaction.
notes: Mapped to nodebuilder RitualEvm inspector path.
rationale: The diff adds an inspect flag to RitualEvm, preserves it across precompile configuration, adds with_inspect, branches transact_raw to inspect_replay when enabled, and sets with_inspect(true) in the factory path that receives an inspector. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When RitualEvmFactory creates an EVM with an inspector, the resulting RitualEvm has inspection mode enabled, and transact_raw executes by setting the transaction on the inner EVM and calling inspect_replay rather than calling transact directly.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create a RitualEvm through the inspector factory path with a test inspector that records callbacks, execute a transaction, and assert inspect_replay callbacks occur; create one with inspect=false and assert transact_raw uses normal transact without inspector replay callbacks.
summary: Inspector EVMs enable inspect mode and execute through inspect_replay.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create an inspector EVM with a callback-recording inspector and assert transact_raw triggers inspect_replay callbacks; compare with inspect=false normal transact.
title: Inspector EVM uses inspect replay
